candidates.firm_aum_context: Mercer Super Trust: Net assets available for member benefits grew from $71.23 billion to $79.85 billion during FY2025 (year ended 30 June 2025). Membership expanded to over 1,062,000 members (30 June 2024: 950,000) [VERIFIED — Mercer Super Trust Annual Report 2025]. Mercer globally: US$692 billion in assets under delegated management as at 31 December 2025 [VERIFIED — Mercer Super website — March 2026]. mobility_signal.rationale: Commenced as CEO, Wealth Pacific at Mercer on 24 July 2023, placing her at only 2 years 8 months in a newly created CEO-level position overseeing A$80B+ in assets. The role represents a significant step up and she is actively leading multiple M&A integrations including BT Super merger and Goldman Sachs & JBWere fund transfer, making her extremely unlikely to move.

role_fit.justification: While Hales has exceptional credentials in funds management and institutional platforms, her career has focused on platform leadership, product strategy, and C-suite executive roles rather than front-line distribution or sales team leadership. Her Fidante Partners role involved overseeing distribution strategy at a platform/business unit head level, not hands-on distribution execution. Her current Mercer role as CEO of an entire wealth division is far broader than a Head of Distribution remit. No evidence of direct experience leading national BDM teams or managing wholesale/platform sales at the level required. She is significantly over-qualified in business leadership but under-qualified in direct distribution execution.

candidates.outreach_hook: Given your role is only in its third year and Mercer's aggressive growth trajectory through the BT Super integration and recent Goldman Sachs & JBWere fund transfer, I imagine your mandate is far from complete — but I wanted to make contact as we work with a well-capitalised active manager seeking to build out senior distribution leadership, and your track record scaling Fidante from $15B to $60B through retail and institutional channels is precisely the profile our client values.
